title: Beast Blitz Dino Assault Dart Gun | Dinosaur Toy & Pretend Gun | Includes 6 Dinosaur Dart Bullets | Dinosaur Toy Weapon Shooting Game | Dinosaur 2-IN-1 Toy Transforming Into Toy Pretend Gun | 3+
description: Product Description Beast Blitz Dino Attack This Dinosaur dart gun is perfect for any child who is dinosaur mad. Transform this toy dinosaur into a shooting gun ready for any Dino battle. Let your little one loose on the attack as they guard your home from any Dino invasions. Kids can improve hand-eye coordination and concentration, patience and release their emotions as your little one takes on their Dino war. A good idea for kids gifts, birthdays, Christmas day or even just a special treat. The Beast Blitz Dino Attack is a transformer dart gun. Change your style! Flip the Dinosaur body parts to real a cool dart gun. This set also includes 6 Foam Dart Bullets. Simply pull back the dinosaurs mouth and lift the head to transform this into a shooting gun, load a bullet into the chamber and fire at your shooting target. This Dino Attack gun is available in two different colourway patterns, with one colour supplied at random (Red or Orange). SUITABLE FOR AGES 3+ PRETEND PLAY Pretend-play is an essential part of early learning and the more your child engages in imaginative play, the more they expand their imagination and creativity. Role-play also allows your child to see things in different perspectives and let them experience a wide range of emotions. A fun and exciting activity that stretches the imagination and enriches creativity, children can come up with their own recipes, make up menus, explore different ingredients and experiment. PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Includes 1x Transformer 2-in1 Dinosaur and Shooting Gun Toy & 6x Dart Foam Bullets. Available in two different colourway patterns, with one colour supplied at random (Red or Orange). Dimensions: H21cm x W7cm x D39cm. Suitable for children aged 3+ BEAST BLITZ RANGE Our Beast Blitz range is perfect for any children who are dinosaur/monster mad. With a wide range for different pretend toy guns and foam dart bullets to choose from, your little one could have the full collection. The beat blitz Transformer range is perfect for providing your children them 2-in 1 games for twice the fun.
